The '''BAS44 Customs-Grade Holoscanner''' was a 110-[[Kilogram/Legends|kilogram]] [[holoscanner]] which showed high-detail, molecular-level, three-dimensional two-meter-by-two-meter images of the insides of anyone who stood behind it, with zoom displays optional. It was patented by [[Bank of Aargau Security, Ltd.|Bank of Aargau Security, Limited]]. All individuals leaving [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]] were required to pass behind a scanner to ensure they were not [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] out precious metals. Standing behind the scanner for longer than one minute could be dangerous for a subject. It could scan an area measuring two by two [[Meter/Legends|meters]].<ref name="Aargau" />

It was new model at the time [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] visited Aargau, being installed at Aargau checkpoints shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. It was considered superior to previous models of holoscanners used on Aargau, but its operation was not yet covered in local security training. Access to the holoscanner was limited by a secure password, but the device was easy to operate. The official press release made the extraordinary claim that local smuggling was reduced 14 percent during the six months before the product came into use, just because the holoscanner discouraged criminals. The device locally cost 300,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], but non-[[Aargauun]]s could only purchase the model on the black market.<ref name="Aargau" />
